name: Sam Okafor
overall_notes: Strong systems background. Came from a referral by Jordan. Very articulate in phone screen.

interview_rounds.notes: Good communication, salary expectations aligned. Motivated by our tech stack.
Solved the system design problem cleanly. Asked excellent clarifying questions. Deep knowledge of distributed systems.
Clean code, good testing instincts. Slightly slow on the graph problem but got there.
Designed a scalable notification system. Great tradeoff analysis. This person is senior-level.

name: Maria Gonzalez
overall_notes: Excellent candidate for IC3. Strong frontend skills, great culture fit. Offer sent, waiting for response.

interview_rounds.notes: Enthusiastic about the role. Currently at a startup, looking for more stability.
Strong React and TypeScript skills. Built a component library at current company.
Excellent problem solving. Code was clean and well-structured.
Great examples of collaboration and handling conflict. Would be a strong addition to the team.

name: Tyler Brooks
overall_notes: Decent technical skills but struggled with system design depth. Not at senior level yet.

interview_rounds.notes: Seemed qualified on paper. 5 years of experience.
Solved the coding problem but couldn't explain time complexity. System design question was weak — didn't consider scalability.

name: Aisha Patel
overall_notes: Applied for EM role. 8 years experience, 3 as a manager. Currently managing a team of 10 at a fintech company.

interview_rounds.notes: Very impressive background. Led a team through a major platform migration. Salary expectations are at the top of our band.
